description:
Implement `hx-text` (T3 tier) — 2/6 libraries ship this. Semantic typography wrapper ensuring consistent text styles with design tokens.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-text/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-text.ts`, `hx-text.styles.ts`, `hx-text.stories.ts`, `hx-text.test.ts`

**Props:** `variant` (`body`|`body-sm`|`body-lg`|`label`|`label-sm`|`caption`|`code`|`overline`), `weight` (`regular`|`medium`|`semibold`|`bold`), `color` (`default`|`subtle`|`disabled`|`inverse`|`danger`|`success`|`warning`), `truncate` (boolean — single-line ellipsis), `lines` (number — multi-line clamp)

**Slots:** default (text content)

**CSS Parts:** `base`

**ARIA:** This is a presentational wrapper. The tag used in the shadow root should match the semantic context — use `<span>` by default. The consumer controls semantic structure with surrounding HTML.

**Tokens:** Each variant maps to `--hx-font-*` tokens (size, weight, line-height, letter-spacing). No hardcoded values.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (each variant renders correct token values, truncation), axe-core zero violations, Storybook type scale demo + all colors, bundle < 2KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-text — T3 Typography/Text Component
